mapper.select: SELECT id, event_id, name, unit_amount, currency, active FROM event_ticket_products WHERE event_id = #{eventId} AND active = TRUE LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO event_ticket_products ( id, event_id, name, unit_amount, currency ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{eventId}, #{name}, #{unitAmount}, #{currency} ) ON CONFLICT (event_id) DO UPDATE SET name = EXCLUDED.name, unit_amount = EXCLUDED.unit_amount, currency = EXCLUDED.currency, active = TRUE, updated_at = NOW()

INSERT INTO ticket_orders ( id, event_id, user_id, ticket_product_id, provider, provider_order_id, provider_payment_id, amount, currency, status, checkout_url, client_secret ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{eventId}, #{userId}, #{ticketProductId}, #{provider}, #{providerOrderId}, #{providerPaymentId}, #{amount}, #{currency}, #{status}, #{checkoutUrl}, #{clientSecret} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, event_id, user_id, ticket_product_id, provider, provider_order_id, provider_payment_id, amount, currency, status, checkout_url, client_secret, created_at, completed_at FROM ticket_orders WHERE id = #{orderId} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payments ( id, order_id, provider, provider_payment_id, amount, currency, status ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{orderId}, #{provider}, #{providerPaymentId}, #{amount}, #{currency}, #{status} )
mapper.update: UPDATE ticket_orders SET status = 'succeeded', completed_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO transactions ( id, user_id, event_id, order_id, transaction_type, amount, currency, status, description, payment_provider, provider_reference ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{eventId}, #{orderId}, 'ticket', #{amount}, #{currency}, 'paid', #{description}, #{provider}, #{providerReference} )
mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.event_id, COALESCE(e.title_hr, t.description) AS event_title, t.order_id, t.transaction_type, t.amount, t.currency, t.status, t.description, t.payment_provider, t.provider_reference, t.created_at FROM transactions t LEFT JOIN events e ON e.id = t.event_id WHERE t.order_id = #{orderId} LIMIT 1
